ModMetaData.name: Dungeons & Pawns
ModMetaData.author: CarlosNahuelcoy
ModMetaData.description: Play tabletop RPG sessions with your colonists. Up to 4 colonists as players, one as Dungeon Master — or take the DM seat yourself. Fully customizable via XML Defs: create your own rulesets, classes, enemies, items, and scenarios. Powered by Player2 AI for NPC voices and colonist reactions (optional).
